title: Bluray release TV original movies August 26th 2015
display_title: Bluray release TV original movies August 26th 2015
wikitext:
[]: Bluray release (TV + original movies) - August 26th 2015             Quote Post by vito » Mon Dec 01, 2014 3:07 am http://www.evangelion.co.jp/ng.html So it's 26 episodes + Director's Cut, Death/Rebirth, EoE and the Revival combo. There's also an Archives DVD boxset, with the original broadcast TV version episodes, plus TV broadcast Death/Rebirth.

[]:             Quote Post by TitaniumViper » Mon Dec 01, 2014 3:32 am Dreams do come true

[]: Evangelion Blu-Ray HD Remaster Announced!             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Mon Dec 01, 2014 3:43 am http://www.khara.co.jp/2014/12/01/%E6%96%B0%E4%B8%96%E7%B4%80%E3%82%A8%E3%83%B4%E3%82%A1%E3%83%B3%E3%82%B2%E3%83%AA%E3%82%AA%E3%83%B3-blu-ray-box-%EF%BC%86-%E6%96%B0%E4%B8%96%E7%B4%80%E3%82%A8%E3%83%B4%E3%82%A1%E3%83%B3%E3%82%B2/ Edit: and http://www.evangelion.co.jp/ng.html Please tell me I'm not seeing things. GOOGLE TRANSLATED (From the first link): 2015 summer will be released [main contents of inclusion] "Neon Genesis Evangelion" HD Remastered NEON GENESIS EVANGELION TV Series all 26 episodes + video format version 4 episodes ( The弐拾Ichihanashi to third弐拾four episodes) "Neon Genesis Evangelion: Death & Rebirth" HD Master EVANGELION: DEATH & REBIRTH "DEATH" (first softening) + "REBIRTH" the "Neon Genesis Evangelion Movie Air / sincerity, you to "HD master THE END OF EVANGELION "Neon Genesis Evangelion Movie DEATH the (TRUE) 2 / Air / sincerity, Kimi to" HD master REVIVAL OF EVANGELION Release Date and Price, for the video benefits other commodity specifications become is shortly official announcement you. <Evangelion> ARCHIVES OF EVANGELION 2015 summer will be released [main contents of inclusion] "Neon Genesis Evangelion" TV broadcast version NEON GENESIS EVANGELION (ON AIR VERSION) TV Series all 26 episodes (TV aired during the intact of the first software of the version) "Neon Genesis Evangelion: Death & Rebirth" TV broadcast version EVANGELION: DEATH (TRUE) & REBIRTH "DEATH (TRUE)" (first softening) + "REBIRTH" Release Date and Price, the video benefits other about commodity specifications will be the official announcement shortly.

[]:             Quote Post by TitaniumViper » Mon Dec 01, 2014 3:50 am Do we know what type of remastering it is going to be? Also this is so unbelievable and you can't even fathom how happy I am right now.

[]:             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Mon Dec 01, 2014 3:51 am TitaniumViper wrote: Do we know what type of remastering it is going to be?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Dec 01, 2014 4:00 am 20th Anniversary of Neon Genesis Evangelion & the year the show primarily takes place in! 2015 is going to be a huge year for Eva Fans everywhere!

[]:             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Mon Dec 01, 2014 4:12 am I'm seriously hoping Funi picks up this release. Perhaps this is what they've been waiting for. Maybe they heard about their plans in advance and decided to wait.

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Mon Dec 01, 2014 4:16 am Oh good i can finally have a copy that doesn't look like its underwater.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Dec 01, 2014 4:16 am Well, that'll be a distraction from the slow progress on the last film!

[]:             Quote Post by vito » Mon Dec 01, 2014 4:22 am It says HD remaster, that's about it.

[]:             Quote Post by TeS Hayami » Mon Dec 01, 2014 4:30 am Hopefully it'll be brand new HD Telecine. Can't wait

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Dec 01, 2014 4:31 am FINALLY FINALLY FINALLY FINALLY FINALLY FINALLY FINALLY ALSO JESUS IT HAS FUCKING EVERYTHING IN IT!?!?!? THAT BOX IS GOING TO COST 1000 DOLLARS OR SOMETHING OH GOOOOODDDDDDDDDDDD

[]:             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Mon Dec 01, 2014 4:37 am Xard wrote: FINALLY FINALLY FINALLY FINALLY FINALLY FINALLY FINALLY ALSO JESUS IT HAS FUCKING EVERYTHING IN IT!?!?!? THAT BOX IS GOING TO COST 1000 DOLLARS OR SOMETHING OH GOOOOODDDDDDDDDDDD

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Mon Dec 01, 2014 4:40 am R.I.P wallet, between this, the souls games, shantae, all the 3ds games i want, The legend of korra boxsets im not going to be able to afford them all. EDIT: and now i get to eat Rei, then get rekt by unit-01 in godmode.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Dec 01, 2014 4:57 am Reacting the only way I know how: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xBlQZyTF_LY&feature=youtu.be&t=6m48s

[]:             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Mon Dec 01, 2014 5:31 am This really excites me, not because of what it is, but because of what it could mean. What I actually want the most is a redub of NGE. Since Khara owns the rights now, then the show will probably get relicensed in America, assuming that Khara isn't as shrewd as Gainax. Now, Funimation said they weren't going to consider dubbing anything else Eva-related until they were done with the Rebuild films, but they can't really afford not to act right now. If they don't snap up the NGE license, another company will. So I'm gonna take a risk here and get preemptively hyped.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Mon Dec 01, 2014 6:04 am Holy Crap! I can't believe this... R.I.P Wallet, but it is going to be all worth it. No wonder why they added NGE to the Evangelion site :).

[]:             Quote Post by vito » Mon Dec 01, 2014 6:20 am Adaminator1 wrote: Plus shipping fees. :P

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Dec 01, 2014 6:20 am If Funi go for a redub and Khara are as critical as they are being (it seems) with Q , then either it'll take ages, or we'll end up with a sub-only release. Maybe a redub of EoE only, to correct Manga's errors and awfulnesses, would be a possibility though.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Dec 01, 2014 6:22 am Not getting excited until they confirm they're actually remastering it properly and not simply dumping the old ass HDCAM tapes onto the discs. EDIT: I bet this will be the reason Newtype is getting an Eva cover and feature story this month.
